title: MITTLEMAN JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER - 211info
text: MITTLEMAN JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER MITTLEMAN JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of sports and recreational programming, including fitness and wellness facilities, an aquatics center, day and vacation camps, an art gallery, cultural and educational programs, social events, and meeting and event spaces. 6651 SW Capitol Highway Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 6am-9pm, Friday 6am-7pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-6pm Email (503) 244-0111 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 244-0111 Main phone Main phone (503) 244-0111 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. Financial assistance available. DOCUMENTS: Membership card required for members. Photo ID required for guests. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 1, 44, and 45 Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Neighborhood Multipurpose Centers Recreation Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
